notes: Added Archive / Restore section to admin main menu via Archive Lite layer.
Lite level uses saved post snapshots from store/ak_posts: text, link/format metadata, MAX attachment snapshot, comments, CTA/gift metadata where present.
Lite republish attempts to send a new channel post from snapshot; old postId is not restored, a new post is created.
PRO media backup is added as a placeholder with description: will be available in Pro version.
No overlay, no floating hints, no external code.run /app comments button.
CC7.4.7 stable post identity and admin addons persistence remain included.
